title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Parle Products South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Parle Products South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Parle Products South Asia Partners are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Raipur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Parle Products South Asia Partners:
Parle Products South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Parle Products South Asia Partners!
